subcodes.first_line: O seeker! The Sought One calleth thee and saith: Cast all else behind thee, then quaff the wine of inner meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا طالب ان المطلوب ینادیک و یقول دع الوری عن وراک ثم اشرب حمیا المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
